seo.title: Lawyers in Lahore | Saeed Law Firm — Trusted Since 1975
seo.description: Looking for the best lawyers in Lahore? Saeed Law Firm has 50+ years and 800+ cases across family, criminal, property, tax, and immigration law. Office on Fane Road.

hero.h1: Best Lawyers in Lahore — Saeed Law Firm
hero.intro: Looking for the best lawyers in Lahore? Saeed Law Firm has 50+ years and 800+ cases across family, criminal, property, tax, and immigration law. Office on Fane Road.

bodyMarkdown:
If you are searching for a **lawyer in Lahore**, the choice you make in the first consultation often shapes the outcome of your case more than any later decision. **Saeed Law Firm** is a Lahore-based law practice that has represented clients across the Lahore High Court, Sessions Court, Civil Courts, and Family Courts at Aiwan-e-Adal since 1975. Over five decades, our **lawyers in Lahore** have appeared in more than 800 matters spanning family, criminal, property, tax, civil, immigration, and corporate law. Our office at 13 Fane Road, Tauheed Manzil, sits within walking distance of every major court in central Lahore — a deliberate choice that lets us file urgent applications, attend mention hearings, and serve notices the same day they are needed.

This page is a working guide. Below, you will find the practice areas we cover, the courts we appear in, how our fees work, and a practical framework for choosing the right **advocate in Lahore** for your matter — whether or not you ultimately engage us. We have written it the way we would brief a new client: directly, with no exaggeration.

### Practice Areas: How a Lawyer in Lahore Can Help You

The legal needs of Lahore residents fall into a small number of recurring categories. Below, each link leads to a dedicated page where we cover the governing law, the relevant Lahore courts, our fee structure for that practice area, and FAQs.

**Family Lawyer in Lahore.** Divorce (talaq), khula, child custody, maintenance (nafaqa), and dower (haq mehr) recovery, all heard at the Family Courts at Aiwan-e-Adal under the West Pakistan Family Courts Act 1964 and the Muslim Family Laws Ordinance 1961. [Read more →](/family-lawyer-in-lahore)

**Criminal Lawyer in Lahore.** Bail (pre-arrest, after-arrest), FIR registration and quashing under Section 561-A CrPC, Sessions trials, and Lahore High Court appeals. [Read more →](/criminal-lawyer-in-lahore)

**Property Lawyer in Lahore.** Land mutation (intiqal), specific performance of sale agreements, partition suits, DHA and LDA allotment disputes, and rental matters. [Read more →](/property-lawyer-in-lahore)

**Tax Lawyer in Lahore.** Income tax notices under sections 122, 161, 177 of the Income Tax Ordinance 2001, FBR audit defence, Commissioner Appeals, and tribunal appeals at ATIR Lahore. [Read more →](/tax-lawyer-in-lahore)

**Civil Lawyer in Lahore.** Suits for declaration, possession, recovery, specific performance, and damages under the Code of Civil Procedure 1908. [Read more →](/civil-lawyer-in-lahore)

**Immigration Lawyer in Lahore.** Documentation and visa-refusal support for the UK, Canada, US, and Australia; MOFA attestation, NOC, and police character certification. [Read more →](/immigration-lawyer-in-lahore)

**Corporate Lawyer in Lahore.** Company incorporation with SECP, shareholder agreements, commercial contract drafting, and director-liability defence under the Companies Act 2017. [Read more →](/corporate-lawyer-in-lahore)

### Lahore Courts We Practise In

A **law firm in Lahore** is only as effective as its presence in the courts where its clients' cases are heard. We appear regularly at:

- **Lahore High Court**, Mall Road — writ petitions, constitutional matters, criminal and civil appeals, and tax references. Our office is 1.2 km from the LHC building. [Court page →](/courts/lawyer-at-lahore-high-court)
- **District Courts Lahore**, Aiwan-e-Adal, Mall Road — civil suits, criminal trials, rent cases, and execution. 0.8 km from our office. [Court page →](/courts/district-court-lawyer-lahore)
- **Family Courts Lahore**, Aiwan-e-Adal — exclusive jurisdiction over divorce, custody, maintenance, and dower. [Court page →](/courts/family-court-lawyer-lahore)
- **Punjab Service Tribunal Lahore** — appeals by government employees against dismissal, suspension, and promotion decisions. [Court page →](/courts/service-tribunal-lawyer-lahore)
- **Appellate Tribunal Inland Revenue (ATIR) Lahore** — second-level tax appeals beyond Commissioner Appeals. [Court page →](/courts/tax-tribunal-lawyer-lahore)
- **Cantonment Court Lahore** — Military Estates Office (MEO) disputes and Cantonment Board byelaw matters. [Court page →](/courts/cantonment-court-lawyer-lahore)

### Areas of Lahore We Serve

Our office is centrally located, but our clients are spread across the city. We frequently represent residents and businesses based in DHA Lahore (all phases), Gulberg, Johar Town, Model Town, Bahria Town Lahore, Lahore Cantt, Faisal Town, and Township. The case mix differs by area — DHA matters tend to involve plot allotment and society bylaws, Gulberg sees more commercial-lease and tax work, while Model Town and Township bring inheritance and partition cases reflecting their older property base.

If you are searching for a **lawyer in DHA Lahore** or a **lawyer in Gulberg Lahore**, our area pages explain the typical case profile, the courts most often used, and how we handle remote consultations for clients who would prefer not to travel to Mall Road for an initial meeting.

### How to Choose the Best Lawyer in Lahore — A Practical Framework

Most articles claiming to list the **best lawyer in Lahore** are either paid placements or generic directories. Here is how a serious client should actually evaluate any **advocate in Lahore**:

**1. Verify Punjab Bar Council enrolment.** Every practising **advocate in Lahore** must be enrolled with the Punjab Bar Council. Ask for the enrolment number and verify it independently. Bilal Saeed, Principal of Saeed Law Firm, is enrolled with the Punjab Bar Council and admitted to the Lahore High Court.

**2. Check the court of admission.** A lawyer admitted only to district courts cannot argue at the Lahore High Court. A lawyer admitted only to the Lahore High Court cannot file at the Supreme Court. Match the court level to the relief you need.

**3. Insist on a written fee proposal before engagement.** Reputable **lawyers in Lahore** put fee structures in writing — separating consultation, drafting, court appearances, and disbursements. Verbal-only fee arrangements are a red flag.

**4. Match specialisation to matter type.** A **family lawyer in Lahore** is not the right choice for a tax appeal. A **criminal lawyer in Lahore** with three decades at the Sessions Court will outperform a generalist on bail applications. Ask directly: "How many cases of this type have you handled in the last two years?"

**5. Avoid lawyers who guarantee outcomes.** Promising a divorce in 30 days, guaranteed bail, or a particular court ruling is a violation of Punjab Bar Council ethics. Outcome guarantees are themselves a sign you should not engage that lawyer.

**6. Look for published work or reported judgments.** **Top lawyers in Lahore** are usually associated with at least some reported case law in PLD, SCMR, MLD, or YLR. Ask if your prospective lawyer has any reported cases — and whether any of them are relevant to your matter. The top lawyers in Lahore who appear regularly at the Lahore High Court will typically have at least a handful of reported judgments going back several years; the top lawyers in Lahore working primarily at the Civil and Sessions Courts may have fewer reported decisions but a deeper trial-level track record.

### Female Lawyers in Lahore

Many family-law and matrimonial clients prefer initial consultation with a **female lawyer in Lahore**. While Bilal Saeed leads our family-law work, our office maintains a confidential, female-friendly consultation environment with female support staff present for sensitive matters. We can also coordinate with female associates where the client specifically requests female representation in court.

### Our Fee Approach

We do not publish fixed prices because no two cases are identical. What we do commit to is full transparency at the consultation stage:

- **Initial consultation:** PKR 5,000–10,000, including a written case scope, applicable statutes, the likely Lahore court, expected timeline, and a fee estimate
- **Routine matters** (uncontested khula, talaq, simple bail, NADRA-related immigration): typically a fixed fee
- **Litigation:** stage-based (charge framing, evidence, defence, arguments, judgment) so you know what the next stage will cost
- **Advisory and corporate work:** hourly rate quoted upfront

The written fee proposal is shared before engagement, not after.

### About Bilal Saeed, Advocate

Bilal Saeed founded Saeed Law Firm in 1975. He is a member of the Punjab Bar Council and is admitted to practise at the Lahore High Court, Lahore Sessions Courts, and Family Courts at Aiwan-e-Adal. His practice focuses on family law, criminal defence, civil and property disputes, and tax representation. He has personally handled or supervised every one of the 800+ cases the firm has taken in five decades.

### Office and How to Reach Us

**Saeed Law Firm**
13 Fane Road, Tauheed Manzil, Lahore, Punjab 54000, Pakistan
**Phone / WhatsApp:** [your number]
**Email:** info@saeedlawfirm.com
**Hours:** Monday–Friday 9:00–18:00 · Saturday 10:00–14:00

We are 0.8 km from the District and Family Courts at Aiwan-e-Adal and 1.2 km from the Lahore High Court — close enough that we can attend a mention hearing, file an urgent application, and return to brief you the same morning.

For clients outside Lahore or overseas Pakistanis, we conduct first consultations by phone, WhatsApp, or Zoom. The intake form on this page books your slot within one business day.

### Frequently Asked Questions

**Who is the best lawyer in Lahore?**
There is no single "best lawyer" — the right lawyer is the one whose specialisation matches your matter. Saeed Law Firm has 50+ years across family, criminal, property, tax, and immigration practice areas. We offer initial consultations to scope your specific case before either side commits.

**How do I verify a lawyer's credentials in Lahore?**
Every practising advocate is enrolled with the Punjab Bar Council. Ask for the enrolment number and verify it on the council's records. Court of admission is a separate question — confirm whether the lawyer is admitted to the Lahore High Court if your matter requires it.

**What is the lawyer's fee structure in Lahore?**
Fees vary by practice area. Family matters are often fixed-fee. Civil and corporate matters are stage-based. Criminal matters split between bail and trial. Initial consultation at Saeed Law Firm is PKR 5,000–10,000 and includes a written case scope.

**Where is Saeed Law Firm located?**
13 Fane Road, Tauheed Manzil, Lahore — minutes from the Lahore High Court, District Courts, and Family Courts at Aiwan-e-Adal. We are open Monday–Friday 9:00–18:00 and Saturday 10:00–14:00.

**Do you offer online or phone consultations?**
Yes. We provide phone, WhatsApp, and Zoom consultations for clients outside Lahore or overseas. The first consultation can be booked via the contact form on this site and is typically scheduled the same week.
